arts.ttl: Serie A | Fiorentina v Napoli: Match Preview
arts.sum: As Serie A kicks off 2025, a crucial clash awaits at the Stadio Artemio Franchi as Fiorentina host league co-leaders Napoli on Saturday evening. This match presents Napoli with a golden opportunity to claim sole possession of first place, while Fiorentina aim to halt their recent slide and reignite their own title aspirations.
